final:
module fan_speed_controller(input [2:0] speed_input,  
                            input clk,  
                            output reg [2:0] speed_output);  

    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        speed_output <= speed_input;  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (speed_input == 3'b000) begin
        speed_output <= 3'b111;
      end else if (speed_input == 3'b111) begin
        speed_output <= 3'b000;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
